title: senecio erucifolius var. viridulus
intro: Senecio erucifolius var. viridulus, also known as Greenleaf Ragwort, is a variety of the Senecio erucifolius plant, which is a member of the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and diuretic effects, and has been employed to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Greenleaf Ragwort include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Greenleaf Ragwort is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to soothe skin irritations.
